HGSS.239.0000:
Ding-ding! Time’s up!
The Bug-Catching Contest is over.\f
HGSS.239.0001:
Ding-ding! You’ve run out of Poké
Balls. The Bug-Catching Contest’s over.\f
HGSS.239.0003:
You still have [0133,0000,0000] minute(s) left.
Do you want to finish now?[0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0004:
Today’s Tuesday.\f
That means the Bug-Catching Contest is
on today.\f
The rules are simple.\f
Using one of your Pokémon, catch a
Bug-type Pokémon to be judged.\f
Would you like to give it a try?[0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0005:
Today’s Thursday.\f
That means the Bug-Catching Contest is
on today.\f
The rules are simple.\f
Using one of your Pokémon, catch a
Bug-type Pokémon to be judged.\f
Would you like to give it a try?[0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0006:
Today’s Saturday.\f
That means the Bug-Catching Contest is
on today.\f
The rules are simple.\f
Using one of your Pokémon, catch a
Bug-type Pokémon to be judged.\f
Would you like to give it a try?[0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0007:
The Bug-Catching Contest is held on
Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday.\f
Not only do you earn a prize just for
participating, you also get to keep the\r
last bug Pokémon you caught.
HGSS.239.0010:
Uh-oh...
You have more than one Pokémon.\f
You’ll have to use [0101,0000,0000], the
first Pokémon in your party.\f
Is that OK with you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0013:
Fine, we’ll hold your other Pokémon
while you compete.\f
[0103,0000,0000]’s Pokémon were left with
the Contest Helper.\f
HGSS.239.0014:
Here are the Sport Balls for the
Contest.\f
[0103,0000,0000] received 20 Sport Balls.\f
HGSS.239.0015:
The person who gets the strongest bug
Pokémon is the winner.\f
You have 20 minutes.\f
If you run out of Sport Balls, you’re
done.\f
You can keep the last Pokémon you
catch as your own.\f
Go out and catch the strongest
Bug-type Pokémon you can find!\f
HGSS.239.0016:
Oh no!\f
I’m sorry, you don’t have enough
room to catch any more Pokémon.
HGSS.239.0017:
OK. We hope you’ll take part in the
future.
HGSS.239.0018:
Today’s Bug-Catching Contest is over.\f
We hope you will participate again in
the future.
HGSS.239.0019:
Some Pokémon can only be seen in
the Park.
HGSS.239.0020:
[0103,0000,0000]?\f
Here’s the prize we were holding
for you.\f
HGSS.239.0021:
Uh-oh...
Your Bag is full, [0103,0000,0000].\f
We’ll hold on to your prize.
Please make room, then come see me.
HGSS.239.0022:
We hope you’ll take part in a
Bug-Catching Contest in the future!
HGSS.239.0023:
You still have [0133,0000,0000] minute(s) left.
Do you want to finish now? [0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0026:
OK. Please go back outside and
finish up.\f
HGSS.239.0027:
OK. Please wait in the National Park for
the announcement of the winners.\f
HGSS.239.0028:
Please reorder your Pokémon,
then come see me.
HGSS.239.0029:
We will now judge the Pokémon you’ve
caught.\f
......
......\f
We have chosen the winners!
Are you ready for this?\f
HGSS.239.0030:
Placing third is [0103,0000,0000], who
caught a writhing [0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0031:
Placing third is the [010E,0002,0000]
[0103,0000,0000], who caught a writhing\r
[0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0033:
Placing second is [0103,0000,0000], who
caught a wriggling [0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0034:
Placing second is the [010E,0002,0000]
[0103,0000,0000], who caught a\r
wriggling [0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0035:
This Bug-Catching Contest winner is...\f
[0103,0000,0000], who caught a whopping
[0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0036:
This Bug-Catching Contest winner is...\f
The [010E,0002,0000] [0103,0000,0000], who
caught a whopping [0100,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0037:
[0103,0000,0000], the First Place
finisher, wins the [0108,0003,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0038:
[0103,0000,0000], the Second Place
finisher, wins the [0108,0003,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0039:
[0103,0000,0000], the Third Place
finisher, wins the [0108,0003,0000]!\f
HGSS.239.0040:
Everyone else gets a [0108,0003,0000] as
a consolation prize!\f
HGSS.239.0041:
Uh-oh...
Your Bag is full, [0103,0000,0000].\f
We’ll hold on to your prize.
Please make room, then come see me.\f
HGSS.239.0042:
We hope you’ll take part in a
Bug-Catching Contest in the future!\f
HGSS.239.0043:
Give a nickname to the
[0100,0001,0000] you caught? [0200,0000]
HGSS.239.0044:
[0103,0000,0000]?\f
Here’s the prize we were holding
for you.\f
HGSS.239.0045:
Uh-oh...
Your Bag is full, [0103,0000,0000].\f
We’ll hold on to your prize.
Please make room, then come see me.\f
HGSS.239.0046:
Your party’s full, so [0101,0005,0000] was
sent to your Box in Bill’s PC.\f
HGSS.239.0047:
We’ll return the Pokémon we kept for
you. Here you go!\f
HGSS.239.0048:
Don: Got it? I’m going to win! Don’t
bother me.
HGSS.239.0049:
Don: Luck plays a big part in this.\f
You never know if Pokémon will
appear.
HGSS.239.0050:
Don: You won? The winner is you!?\f
I’m so jealous... It’d be fantastic
to be the winner...
HGSS.239.0051:
Ed: My PARASECT makes Pokémon fall
asleep with Spore.
HGSS.239.0052:
Ed: You can’t win with Pokémon that are
run down or low on HP.
HGSS.239.0053:
Ed: I envy you. I just couldn’t do it
this time.
HGSS.239.0054:
Abby: I’ve been training Pokémon that
inflict status problems for\r
this contest.
HGSS.239.0055:
Abby: I heard that using Pokémon with
beautiful colors makes it easier to win.\r
I wonder if that’s true?
HGSS.239.0056:
Abby: Wonderful! You sparkle and gleam
right now. You really do!
HGSS.239.0057:
William: Winning? I’m more interested in
finding rare Pokémon.
HGSS.239.0058:
William: Well, I’m satisfied because
I caught a Pokémon I wanted.
HGSS.239.0059:
William: You’re the winner? What did you
catch? Show me, show me!
HGSS.239.0060:
Benny: ...... ...... ......
...... ...... Ssssh!\f
You’ll scare off SCYTHER.
I’ll talk to you later.
HGSS.239.0061:
Benny: Listen, I caught a SCYTHER
before, but I didn’t win.
HGSS.239.0062:
Benny: I just came to see how things
were going today, you know?\f
I’ll really try my best next time!
HGSS.239.0063:
Barry: You should weaken bug Pokémon
first, then throw a Poké Ball.
HGSS.239.0064:
Barry: It’s easier to win if you get a
high-level bug Pokémon. But I think\r
they also consider some other points.
HGSS.239.0065:
Barry: That Pokémon you caught...
It’s awesome!
HGSS.239.0066: Cindy: I really love bug Pokémon!
HGSS.239.0067:
Cindy: I really love bug Pokémon!\f
Did I already say that?
HGSS.239.0068:
Cindy: Congratulations on winning!
By the way...\f
Did I mention that I really love bug
Pokémon?
HGSS.239.0069:
Josh: I’ve been collecting bug Pokémon
since I was just a baby.\f
There’s no way I’m going to lose!
HGSS.239.0070:
Josh: I heard that somebody won with a
CATERPIE!
HGSS.239.0071:
Josh: It’s called a Bug-Catching
Contest, not a Bird-Catching Contest!\f
You, of all people, should know that.
After all, you won!
HGSS.239.0072:
Samuel: What?
If you’ve got the time to chat, go find\r
some bug Pokémon.
HGSS.239.0073:
Samuel: So... I thought I would
score higher...
HGSS.239.0074:
Samuel: It’s so disappointing...
I won’t forget this defeat, and...
HGSS.239.0075:
Kipp: I’ve studied bug Pokémon a lot.
I’m going to win for sure.
HGSS.239.0076:
Kipp: I study a lot, but that’s not
enough to win.
HGSS.239.0077:
Kipp: Could you give me some tips?
I want to win!
